title: Relationship Change
englishInput: During the last two months, conversations between me, my husband, and another family member became shorter whenever money or childcare was discussed. I often stop explaining, my husband repeats practical advice, and the third person withdraws. When one person asks a specific question instead of giving advice, the conversation lasts longer. I want us to express needs without ending the conversation.
chineseInput: 过去两个月里，每当我、丈夫与另一位家人讨论金钱或照顾孩子，谈话就会变短。我常常停止解释，丈夫重复实际建议，第三个人则退出；当其中一人提出具体问题而不是直接给建议时，谈话会持续更久。我希望大家可以表达需要，而不必结束谈话。
revisedEnglishInput: Over the last two months, three-person conversations became shorter specifically after advice was repeated and I stopped explaining my position.
revisedChineseInput: 过去两个月里，三人谈话主要在建议被重复、而我停止解释自己的位置之后明显缩短。
desiredDirection: Keep multi-person conversations open long enough for each person to state a need and one observable next action.
desiredDirectionZh: 让多人谈话保持开放，直到每个人都能表达一项需要与一个可观察的下一步行动。
observedEvidence: Conversations became shorter after advice was repeated.
One person withdrew from the discussion.
reportedExperience: I feel unheard and stop explaining.
unknownReality: Whether each person understands the others' intended responsibility remains unknown.
